summary.title: Frequently Asked Questions
summary.description: Common questions about Vivan Pandya, his education, skills, projects, and career.

faqs.question: Who is Vivan Pandya?
faqs.answer: Vivan Pandya is a Computer Science Engineering student at Pandit Deendayal Energy University (PDEU) with interests in Full Stack Development, Artificial Intelligence, Software Engineering, and System Design.

faqs.question: What is Vivan currently studying?
faqs.answer: He is pursuing a Bachelor of Technology (B.Tech.) in Computer Science Engineering at Pandit Deendayal Energy University (PDEU).

faqs.question: What programming languages does Vivan know?
faqs.answer: Vivan works with JavaScript, Python, Java, C, SQL, HTML, and CSS.

faqs.question: What databases has Vivan used?
faqs.answer: He has experience with PostgreSQL and MySQL.

faqs.question: What projects has Vivan built?
faqs.answer: Some of his major projects include an AI Portfolio Assistant, a Lost & Found Management System, and a modern personal portfolio website.

faqs.question: Does Vivan have internship experience?
faqs.answer: Currently, Vivan does not have formal internship experience but has developed practical software engineering skills through multiple personal and academic projects.

faqs.question: Is Vivan available for internships?
faqs.answer: Yes. He is actively looking for software engineering internship opportunities.

faqs.question: Is Vivan available for freelance work?
faqs.answer: Yes. He is open to suitable freelance opportunities.

faqs.question: Does Vivan prefer remote work?
faqs.answer: Yes. He is available for remote opportunities.

faqs.question: How can I contact Vivan?
faqs.answer: You can contact him through email, LinkedIn, or GitHub using the contact section of this portfolio.

faqs.question: What are Vivan's career goals?
faqs.answer: His goal is to become a Full Stack Software Engineer specializing in Artificial Intelligence and scalable software systems.

faqs.question: What technologies is Vivan currently learning?
faqs.answer: He is continuously improving his knowledge of Full Stack Development, Artificial Intelligence, System Design, Backend Development, and Cloud Technologies.

faqs.question: What makes Vivan a good candidate?
faqs.answer: He focuses on clean code, modular architecture, continuous learning, real-world projects, and modern software engineering practices.

faqs.question: Where can I view Vivan's projects?
faqs.answer: Projects are available in the Projects section of this portfolio and on his GitHub profile.
